scripts.build: dotnet publish "../Slice.WasiSample.csproj" -r wasi-wasm -c Release && npm run transpile
scripts.transpile: jco transpile "slice-wasi-sample.wasm" -o component --name slice-wasi-sample --tla-compat --no-namespaced-exports --instantiation async --map 'wasi:sockets/tcp@0.2.0=../stubs/tcp.js' --map 'wasi:sockets/udp@0.2.0=../stubs/udp.js' && wasm-opt -Oz component/slice-wasi-sample.core.wasm -o component/slice-wasi-sample.core.wasm && node generate-module-map.mjs
